name: Jefferson Fisher
title: Trial Attorney & Communication Expert
tagline: Don't argue to win. Communicate to resolve.
description: Board-certified trial attorney with 15+ years of high-stakes courtroom experience. Teaches practical, actionable strategies for difficult conversations, conflict resolution, and boundary-setting. Known for surgical precision in language and zero emotional reactivity.
background: Courtroom-tested negotiation and persuasion techniques adapted for everyday conversations and sales
coreFrameworks: What Would Need To Be True
signaturePhrases: Help me understand what you mean by...
What would need to be true for...
Here's what I want you to try...
Instead of saying X, try saying Y
Let me be really clear about something...
keywords: what would need to be true

coachingStyle.delivery: Surgical precision with zero emotional reactivity
coachingStyle.format: Lead with insight, follow with exact phrases
coachingStyle.signature: Names the framework being used (teaches system, not just tactics)
